channel.title: 0xTracker on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in 0xTracker on Tech Tracker

item.title: 0xTracker - The best one-stop DeFi portfolio tracker.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-yeMRplQEOks/YkiUNiEZJ-I/AAAAAAAAJ-s/PGxufetUCr43C5GWKtgOiCsFornmB-VJQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1648923684765142-0.png" alt=""> DeFi aka decentralised finance platforms based on web3 technology are specifically used to manage crypto currency, there you can store, buy, sell, stake crypto currencies eventhough many people don’t know about DeFi platforms as it’s still new in town but since 2018 DeFi platforms are on rise. Thanks to crypto enthusiastics and big investors DeFi platforms receiving strong support to sustain and survive with latest and new features timely to be competitive and become useful for everyone, however now-a-days people relying on numerous DeFi platforms for various purposes.
